footer.desc: Edge micro compute center — your data stays local. Fully proprietary IP. Billion-yuan compute for free.

home.slogan: Edge Micro Compute — Data Stays Local
home.tagline: Your data stays in your own devices — more secure, more reliable. No cloud upload needed. Information always in your hands. The only team in China achieving compute acceleration via hardware-accelerated all-flash storage.
home.productDesc: Turnkey, one-box operation, one-click start. Scale linearly from one unit to ten thousand. Leasing from ¥2,000/month.
home.caseDesc: Successfully deployed in education, telecom, and finance. Huawei Ascend + Kunpeng dual-certified. Significantly boosting compute efficiency and reducing TCO.
home.why1Desc: Data stays in your own devices. No cloud upload. Compliant with data security regulations, protecting data sovereignty and trade secrets.
home.why2Desc: Compute-storage disaggregation with EBOF all-flash. 60%+ response efficiency gain, 40% lower TCO, 72% faster data loading.
home.why3Desc: Scale up in 4 hours with zero downtime. From single box to thousands. Hot-swap plug-and-play architecture.
home.why4Desc: 100% proprietary IP. Huawei Ascend & Kunpeng dual-certified. 90%+ domestic GPU compatibility.
home.techDesc: Compute-storage disaggregation + EBOF all-flash — two pillars of proprietary innovation, natively deep-integrated. The only team in China achieving compute acceleration via hardware-accelerated all-flash.
home.partnerDesc: Deep partnerships with Huawei, Cambricon, NVIDIA, Peking University, HKUST and more, building the AI compute ecosystem together.
home.businessModelDesc: Data stays local for safety. Zero franchise fee to become a partner. Receive 100 free Weisuàn units (worth ~¥5M). Share in future IPO proceeds.
home.galleryTitle: From Single Unit to Ten Thousand
home.ctaFinalDesc: Leasing from ¥2,000/month. Deploy in 48-72 hours. Data stays local. 3-year TCO far below traditional solutions.
